    - `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md` records qwork proof timestamp, current main SHA, exact commands executed, target classifications, selected successor, and no-local/no-mutation/no-public-site/no-Cloudflare boundaries.
  - **References:** NA-0547; NA-0548; D-1084; D-1083; D-1082; `remote-handshake` historical run `28222737830`; `remote-relay` historical run `28221877145`; `relay-ui-integration` historical run `28221488004`; current-main runs `28298341119`, `28298371731`, and `28298405239`; `.github/workflows/remote-handshake-tests.yml`; `.github/workflows/remote-relay-tests.yml`; `.github/workflows/relay-ui-integration.yml`; `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0547_remote_relay_non_required_ci_failure_bounded_reproduction_log_capture_harness.md`; `tests/NA-0547_remote_relay_non_required_ci_failure_bounded_reproduction_log_capture_testplan.md`; `TRACEABILITY.md`; `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md`

- **ID:** D-1086
  - **Title:** NA-0548 remote/relay non-required CI failure follow-up evidence authorization
  - **Date:** 2026-06-27
  - **Status:** Accepted
  - **Goal IDs:** G1, G2, G3, G4, G5
  - **Decision:** NA-0548 accepts a targeted follow-up evidence authorization plan for the remote-handshake, remote-relay, and relay-ui-integration failures reproduced by NA-0547. D-1084 and D-1085 were consumed. Fresh qwork proof from `2026-06-27T19:36:42Z` was verified from `.kv`, JSON, and cargo-target env files. Current main HEAD and origin/main were verified at `17737472b438`. public-safety completed success. advisories completed success. No failed required check was observed. Branch-protection required contexts were classified, including PR #1368 proof for PR-only `goal-lint` and current CodeQL Analyze proof. NA-0547 reproduction results were inherited: remote-handshake reproduced current, remote-relay reproduced current, and relay-ui-integration reproduced current.
  - **Evidence review:** Failure signatures were reviewed. remote-handshake failed in `Run remote handshake smoke (happy-path seed=1)` with exit code 1 and bounded message `vault init failed for alice`. remote-relay failed in `Run remote relay smoke (manual/nightly)` with exit code 1, marker error `contacts_store_invalid`, and failed happy-path count expectations. relay-ui-integration failed in `Start local relay and run ignored relay UI integration tests` with exit code 22 after a loopback health request returned HTTP 404. Workflow and referenced-surface review completed for `.github/workflows/remote-handshake-tests.yml`, `.github/workflows/remote-relay-tests.yml`, `.github/workflows/relay-ui-integration.yml`, `scripts/demo/qsc_remote_handshake_smoke.sh`, `scripts/demo/qsc_remote_relay_smoke.sh`, `qsl/qsl-client/qsc/tests/relay_ui_integration.rs`, and `qsl/qsl-client/qsc/tests/common/mod.rs`.
  - **Gap and readiness classification:** Per-target evidence gaps were classified as `REMOTE_HANDSHAKE_GAP_ADDITIONAL_GITHUB_LOGS_REQUIRED`, `REMOTE_RELAY_GAP_ADDITIONAL_GITHUB_LOGS_REQUIRED`, and `RELAY_UI_GAP_ADDITIONAL_GITHUB_LOGS_REQUIRED`. Implementation readiness was reviewed and all three targets are `IMPLEMENTATION_NOT_READY_MORE_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED`; exact remediation ownership and mutation paths are not selected. qsl-server/qsl-attachments boundary was classified `QSL_SERVER_BOUNDARY_GITHUB_ACTIONS_BLACK_BOX_ONLY`: relay UI uses qsl-server only through the existing GitHub Actions workflow, and qsl-attachments is not directly invoked by the relay UI test.
  - **Follow-up authorization:** D-1086 selects read-only GitHub metadata/log/artifact capture for already-created NA-0547 runs only. Authorized future evidence commands are limited to `gh run view <known-run-id> --json databaseId,headSha,headBranch,event,status,conclusion,attempt,workflowName,jobs,url,createdAt,updatedAt`, `gh api /repos/QuantumShieldLabs/qsl-protocol/actions/runs/<known-run-id>/jobs?per_page=100`, `gh run view <known-run-id> --log`, `gh api /repos/QuantumShieldLabs/qsl-protocol/actions/runs/<known-run-id>/artifacts?per_page=100`, and `gh run download <known-run-id> --name <known-artifact-name> --dir "$PROOF_DIR/artifacts/<target>/<known-run-id>"` for the known NA-0547 run IDs and artifact names recorded in the evidence document. No rerun or workflow dispatch is authorized by D-1086.
  - **Result classification:** `REMOTE_RELAY_FOLLOW_UP_EVIDENCE_TARGETED_GITHUB_CAPTURE_READY`.
  - **Selected successor:** `NA-0549 -- QSL Remote/Relay Non-Required CI Failure Targeted Follow-Up Evidence Harness`.
  - **Boundary proof:** No rerun executed. No workflow dispatch executed. No local reproduction executed. No workflow mutation occurred. No runtime/source mutation occurred. No dependency/lockfile mutation occurred. No qsc source/test/fuzz/Cargo mutation occurred. No qsl-server/qsl-attachments command or mutation occurred. - **ID:** D-1088
  - **Title:** NA-0549 remote/relay non-required CI failure targeted follow-up evidence
  - **Date:** 2026-06-27
  - **Status:** Accepted
  - **Goal IDs:** G1, G2, G3, G4, G5
  - **Decision:** NA-0549 accepts the D-1086-authorized targeted follow-up evidence capture for the remote-handshake, remote-relay, and relay-ui-integration non-required failures reproduced by NA-0547. D-1086 and D-1087 were consumed. Fresh qwork proof from `2026-06-27T20:45:18Z` was verified from `.kv`, JSON, and cargo-target env files. Current main HEAD and origin/main were verified at `e2e4b159ebfd`. public-safety completed success. advisories completed success. No failed required check was observed. Branch-protection required contexts were classified, including PR #1370 rollup proof for PR-only `goal-lint` and aggregate `CodeQL`.
  - **Target evidence reviewed:** The six exact target run IDs were reviewed: remote-handshake historical `28222737830`, remote-handshake current-main `28298341119`, remote-relay historical `28221877145`, remote-relay current-main `28298371731`, relay-ui-integration historical `28221488004`, and relay-ui-integration current-main `28298405239`. Run/job/check metadata was captured. Artifact metadata was captured. Small target-named diagnostic artifacts were downloaded proof-root-only and scanned. Raw logs were captured proof-root-only. Redacted bounded summaries were produced. Private-material scan result was raw logs `PASS_HANDLED`, redacted extracts `PASS`, artifacts `PASS_HANDLED`, and candidate summaries `PASS`.
  - **Failure correlation:** remote-handshake historical and current-main signatures match: failed step `Run remote handshake smoke (happy-path seed=1)`, exit code 1, bounded message `vault init failed for alice`, with artifact marker narrowing the failure to retired passphrase-env vault initialization before relay interaction. remote-relay historical and current-main signatures match: failed step `Run remote relay smoke (manual/nightly)`, exit code 1, repeated `contacts_store_invalid` markers, failed remote-complete status, and zero delivery/count artifacts before successful relay delivery markers. relay-ui-integration historical and current-main signatures match: failed step `Start local relay and run ignored relay UI integration tests`, exit code 22, loopback health HTTP 404 after TCP bind proof and before ignored qsc relay UI tests ran.
  - **Gap and readiness classification:** Updated evidence gaps are `REMOTE_HANDSHAKE_GAP_EXACT_IMPLEMENTATION_READY`, `REMOTE_RELAY_GAP_EXACT_IMPLEMENTATION_READY`, and `RELAY_UI_GAP_QSL_SERVER_BOUNDARY_REQUIRED`. Implementation readiness is remote-handshake `IMPLEMENTATION_READY_EXACT_PATHS` with future exact path `scripts/demo/qsc_remote_handshake_smoke.sh`, remote-relay `IMPLEMENTATION_READY_EXACT_PATHS` with future exact path `scripts/demo/qsc_remote_relay_smoke.sh`, and relay-ui-integration `IMPLEMENTATION_NOT_READY_QSL_SERVER_BOUNDARY_REQUIRED`. qsl-server/qsl-attachments boundary classification is `QSL_SERVER_BOUNDARY_SEPARATE_AUTHORIZATION_REQUIRED`.
  - **Result classification:** `REMOTE_RELAY_TARGETED_EVIDENCE_QSL_SERVER_BOUNDARY_READY`.
  - **Selected successor:** `NA-0550 -- QSL Relay UI qsl-server Boundary Authorization Plan`. The successor is authorization-only and must define whether and how relay UI reproduction or remediation may use qsl-server/qsl-attachments context before any local qsl-server or relay UI reproduction is attempted.
  - **Selected successor block:** `NA-0550 -- QSL Relay UI qsl-server Boundary Authorization Plan` is READY with Goals G1, G2, G3, G4, G5. Allowed scope is `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0550_relay_ui_qsl_server_boundary_authorization_plan.md`, `tests/NA-0550_relay_ui_qsl_server_boundary_authorization_testplan.md`, `DECISIONS.md`, `TRACEABILITY.md`, `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md`, read-only qsl-protocol workflow/test references, read-only GitHub qsl-server/qsl-attachments workflow metadata if visible, exact future boundary design, and successor selection. Forbidden scope is qsl-server/qsl-attachments clone/build/run/mutation, workflow mutation, runtime mutation, dependency/lockfile mutation, qsc source/test/fuzz/Cargo mutation, remote command, qwork/qstart/qresume execution by Codex, qsl-backup execution, backup mutation, public-site mutation, Cloudflare mutation, and public-readiness, production-readiness, vulnerability-free, bug-free, or perfect-build claim.

- **ID:** D-1092
  - **Title:** NA-0551 remote smoke demo script remediation relay API boundary stop handoff
  - **Date:** 2026-06-27
  - **Status:** Accepted
  - **Goal IDs:** G1, G2, G3, G4, G5
  - **Decision:** NA-0551 accepts the terminal relay API boundary stop for the remote-handshake and remote-relay demo script remediation lane. D-1090 and D-1091 were consumed. D465 attempted exact script-only remediation on branch `na-0551-remote-smoke-demo-script-remediation` with branch commits `ab4ab9bba14f` and `2b897d658416`; that branch was not merged, no PR was opened for it, and its diff remains limited to `scripts/demo/qsc_remote_handshake_smoke.sh` and `scripts/demo/qsc_remote_relay_smoke.sh`. D465 branch validation failed after deterministic setup. D466 reviewed the stopped branch and selected `SCRIPT_ONLY_FIX_NOT_SUPPORTED_RELAY_API_BOUNDARY`. The final bounded failure is `relay_inbox_push_failed`, occurring after deterministic vault/contact setup and qsc payload construction. Exact HTTP status/body was not safely visible enough to prove a script-only fix. Further script patching would risk guessing at relay API, qsc runtime, secret, environment, or remote relay behavior.
  - **Result classification:** `REMOTE_SMOKE_DEMO_SCRIPT_REMEDIATION_RELAY_API_BOUNDARY_STOP_ACCEPTED`.
  - **Selected successor:** `NA-0552 -- QSL Remote Relay API Boundary Diagnosis Authorization Plan`.
  - **Boundary proof:** No script changes are merged. No runtime/source/qsc/workflow/dependency mutation occurred on main. No qsl-server/qsl-attachments command or mutation occurred. No rerun, workflow dispatch, or local reproduction occurred in this handoff. No qwork/qstart/qresume execution by Codex occurred. No qsl-backup occurred. No public-site or Cloudflare mutation occurred. No raw logs or private material were published. Exactly one READY remains mandatory.
  - **Claim boundary:** No public-readiness claim is made. No production-readiness claim is made. No public-internet-readiness claim is made. No external-review-complete claim is made. No reproducibility-complete claim is made. No backup/restore-complete claim is made. No vulnerability-free claim is made. No bug-free claim is made. No perfect-build claim is made. No perfect-crypto claim is made.
  - **Security invariants introduced/changed:**
    - Failed remote relay push remains fail-closed and cannot be hidden by script assertions.
    - Script-only remediation must not proceed when the remaining evidence belongs to relay API, qsc runtime, secret/environment, or remote relay behavior boundaries.
    - Raw logs, route capabilities, bearer tokens, passphrases, token hashes, private endpoints, and raw fingerprints remain proof-root-only.
    - The stopped remediation branch remains preserved as evidence and must not be merged as this handoff.
  - **Alternatives considered:**
    - Patch the scripts again (rejected because D466 did not prove a bounded script-only fix).
    - Merge the stopped branch despite failing validation (rejected because validation failed at `relay_inbox_push_failed`).
    - Open a PR for the stopped remediation branch (rejected because this handoff records a terminal stop, not remediation).
    - Move directly to qsc runtime or qsl-server implementation (rejected because the next step must authorize and classify the remote relay API boundary first).
  - **Implications for spec/impl/tests:**
    - `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0551_remote_handshake_remote_relay_demo_script_relay_api_boundary_stop_handoff.md` records qwork proof, D-1090/D-1091 inheritance, D465 attempts, D466 diagnosis, branch preservation, relay API boundary classification, private-material handling, no-merge/no-PR proof, result classification, and selected successor.
    - `tests/NA-0551_remote_handshake_remote_relay_demo_script_relay_api_boundary_stop_handoff_testplan.md` records stop-handoff markers and governance-only validation gates.
    - `TRACEABILITY.md` maps NA-0551, D-1092, D465, D466, the stopped branch, branch validation runs, relay API boundary stop classification, and selected NA-0552 successor.
    - `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md` records the stop handoff and no-mutation boundaries.
  - **References:** NA-0551; NA-0552; D-1092; D-1091; D-1090; D465 response `NA0551_remote_handshake_remote_relay_demo_script_remediation_20260627T231725Z_D465.md`; D466 response `NA0551_remote_smoke_remediation_recovery_20260627T233629Z_D466.md`; branch `na-0551-remote-smoke-demo-script-remediation`; commits `ab4ab9bba14f`, `2b897d658416`; runs `28304536771`, `28304537372`, `28304699022`, `28304701270`; `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0551_remote_handshake_remote_relay_demo_script_relay_api_boundary_stop_handoff.md`; `tests/NA-0551_remote_handshake_remote_relay_demo_script_relay_api_boundary_stop_handoff_testplan.md`; `TRACEABILITY.md`; `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md`

  - **Diagnostic path review:** qsc diagnostic path review completed. Script diagnostic path review completed. Workflow diagnostic boundary review completed with `WORKFLOW_DIAGNOSTIC_MUTATION_NOT_REQUIRED`. Diagnostic redaction policy selected. Instrumentation design selected. Future validation policy selected.
  - **Instrumentation model selected:** `DIAGNOSTIC_MODEL_QSC_PLUS_SCRIPT_HARNESS`.
  - **Selected diagnostic gate:** qsc env var `QSC_RELAY_PUSH_DIAGNOSTIC=redacted`; no CLI flag selected.
  - **Exact future mutation paths:** `qsl/qsl-client/qsc/src/transport/mod.rs`; `qsl/qsl-client/qsc/tests/relay_push_diagnostics.rs`; `qsl/qsl-client/qsc/tests/secret_material_diagnostic_boundary.rs`; `scripts/demo/qsc_remote_handshake_smoke.sh`; `scripts/demo/qsc_remote_relay_smoke.sh`; `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0554_remote_relay_api_boundary_diagnostic_instrumentation_implementation_harness.md`; `tests/NA-0554_remote_relay_api_boundary_diagnostic_instrumentation_implementation_testplan.md`; `DECISIONS.md`; `TRACEABILITY.md`; `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md`.

  - **Redaction policy:** Diagnostics remain disabled by default. When `QSC_RELAY_PUSH_DIAGNOSTIC=redacted` is enabled by an authorized validation harness, qsc may emit status class, exact HTTP status code, local error class, response body presence boolean, response body length, route-token header presence boolean, bearer auth presence boolean, endpoint path label `relay_push`, attempt count, qsc error variant, and optional non-secret run correlation id. qsc and scripts must never emit route-token values, bearer token values, Authorization headers, request payloads, full private endpoint hosts, response body content, body hashes, route capabilities, private topology, passphrases, private keys, or secret environment values. Raw diagnostic logs are proof-root-only and repository docs are summary-only after private-material scans.
  - **Future validation policy:** Required validation includes `git diff --check`; `cargo test -p qsc --locked --test relay_push_diagnostics -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture`; `cargo test -p qsc --locked --test secret_material_diagnostic_boundary -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture`; `cargo test -p qsc --locked --test relay_dup_no_mutation -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture`; `bash -n scripts/demo/qsc_remote_handshake_smoke.sh scripts/demo/qsc_remote_relay_smoke.sh`; `cargo fmt --check`; root and nested qsc fuzz lock cargo audits; qsc adversarial shell syntax checks; added-line/new-file private-material scan; and raw-log private-material scan before summary use. Branch workflow validation, if authorized by the implementation directive, uses existing workflows only: `gh workflow run remote-handshake-tests.yml --ref <branch>`; `gh workflow run remote-relay-tests.yml --ref <branch> -f scenario=happy-path -f seed=1`; `gh workflow run remote-relay-tests.yml --ref <branch> -f scenario=drop-reorder -f seed=7`.
  - **Result classification:** `REMOTE_RELAY_DIAGNOSTIC_INSTRUMENTATION_IMPLEMENTATION_READY`.
  - **Selected successor:** `NA-0554 -- QSL Remote Relay API Boundary Diagnostic Instrumentation Implementation Harness`.
  - **Selected successor block:** NA-0554 is READY with Goals G1, G2, G3, G4, G5. Objective: implement bounded, redacted diagnostic instrumentation for the qsc relay push boundary selected by NA-0553. Expose enough status/error classification to diagnose `relay_inbox_push_failed` in remote-handshake and remote-relay validation without printing route-token values, bearer material, Authorization headers, private endpoint hosts, request payloads, response bodies, private topology, or secret environment values. No other recovery crossed scope or security boundaries.
  - **Security invariants introduced/changed:**
    - Diagnostic output must be disabled by default and explicitly enabled only as redacted output in authorized validation lanes.
    - qsc remains the owner of relay push status/error classification; scripts may consume qsc diagnostics but must not infer hidden relay API behavior.
    - Redacted diagnostics may expose status/error classes but must not expose secret values, private endpoint hosts, payloads, response bodies, private topology, or secret environment values.
    - Workflow, dependency, lockfile, qsl-server, qsl-attachments, public-site, and Cloudflare boundaries remain unchanged.
  - **Alternatives considered:**
    - Script-only diagnostics (rejected because qsc currently swallows the needed status/body/error class).
    - qsc CLI flag only (rejected because it requires broader command plumbing than an env-gated diagnostic).
    - Workflow plus qsc mutation (rejected because existing scripts can enable redacted diagnostics and existing workflows already capture logs/artifacts).
    - Remote environment/secret-boundary review first (rejected because safe qsc redacted instrumentation paths and validation policy are exact enough to proceed before requesting external secret-boundary proof).
    - qsc runtime review first (rejected because exact qsc relay push diagnostic paths are identified).
  - **Implications for spec/impl/tests:**
    - `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0553_remote_relay_api_boundary_diagnostic_instrumentation_authorization_plan.md` records qwork proof, D-1094/D-1095 inheritance, current-main required-check classification, inherited status/body gap, qsc/script/workflow diagnostic reviews, redaction policy, instrumentation design, future path bundle, validation policy, result classification, selected successor, and no-mutation/no-claim boundaries.
    - `tests/NA-0553_remote_relay_api_boundary_diagnostic_instrumentation_authorization_testplan.md` records the required NA-0553 markers and governance-only validation gates.
    - `TRACEABILITY.md` maps NA-0553 to D-1096, D-1094/D-1095 inheritance, qsc diagnostic path review, script diagnostic path review, workflow diagnostic boundary, redaction policy, instrumentation design, selected future path bundle, and testplan markers.
    - `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md` records qwork proof timestamp, current main SHA, selected instrumentation model, result classification, selected successor, recovered branch-ref proof issue, and no-rerun/no-dispatch/no-reproduction/no-mutation/no-public-site/no-Cloudflare boundaries.
  - **References:** NA-0553; NA-0554; D-1096; D-1095; D-1094; branch `na-0551-remote-smoke-demo-script-remediation`; runs `28304536771`, `28304537372`, `28304699022`, `28304701270`; `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0553_remote_relay_api_boundary_diagnostic_instrumentation_authorization_plan.md`; `tests/NA-0553_remote_relay_api_boundary_diagnostic_instrumentation_authorization_testplan.md`; `TRACEABILITY.md`; `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md`

- **ID:** D-1100
  - **Title:** NA-0555 remote relay API boundary diagnostic evidence capture
  - **Date:** 2026-06-28
  - **Status:** Accepted
  - **Goal IDs:** G1, G2, G3, G4, G5
  - **Decision:** NA-0555 accepts the remote relay API boundary diagnostic evidence capture. D-1098 and D-1099 were consumed. Fresh qwork proof from `2026-06-28T14:03:22Z` was verified. Current main HEAD and origin/main were verified at `e5f49a17c357`. public-safety completed success. advisories completed success. No failed required check was classified. Branch-protection required contexts were classified, with associated PR-head proof used for PR-only `CodeQL` and `goal-lint` contexts. NA-0554 diagnostic instrumentation was inherited. The exact workflow dispatches were executed: `remote-handshake-tests.yml` on main and `remote-relay-tests.yml` on main with `scenario=happy-path` and `seed=1`.
  - **Run/job proof:** remote-handshake run `28325075419` / job `83913585385` failed at the expected smoke step and emitted one safe redacted relay-push diagnostic marker from the exact run artifact. remote-relay run `28325168201` / job `83913828473` failed at the expected smoke step and emitted two safe redacted relay-push diagnostic markers from the exact run artifact. Raw Actions logs were captured proof-root-only. Artifacts were downloaded proof-root-only only because the raw Actions logs did not contain the diagnostic marker needed for classification.
  - **Redacted diagnostic summaries:** remote-handshake observed status class `unknown`, status code `unknown`, error class `timeout`, response body present `unknown`, response body length `unknown`, route-token header present `true`, bearer auth present `true`, endpoint label `relay_push_v1`, qsc error `relay_inbox_push_failed`, and qsc attempt count `1`. remote-relay observed the same safe fields for two send attempts. No route-token value, bearer value, Authorization header, request payload content, response body content, full private endpoint host, route capability value, passphrase, private key, secret environment value, private topology, GitHub token, API key, SSH material, backup material, or Cloudflare token was published.
  - **Private-material scan result:** raw-log scan passed with proof-root quarantine. Artifact scan passed with proof-root quarantine; the remote-relay artifact included a request-payload artifact file, which remains proof-root-only and is not summarized. Redacted-summary scan passed. Candidate repository summaries include only safe diagnostic fields.
  - **Per-target classifications:** remote-handshake classification is `REMOTE_HANDSHAKE_DIAGNOSTIC_NETWORK_TLS_TIMEOUT`. remote-relay classification is `REMOTE_RELAY_DIAGNOSTIC_NETWORK_TLS_TIMEOUT`.
  - **Result classification:** `REMOTE_RELAY_DIAGNOSTIC_EVIDENCE_REMOTE_ENV_SECRET_BOUNDARY_READY`.
  - **Selected successor:** `NA-0556 -- QSL Remote Relay Environment and Secret Boundary Review Authorization Plan`.
  - **Selected successor block:** NA-0556 is READY with Goals G1, G2, G3, G4, G5. Objective: authorize a bounded review of remote relay endpoint, environment, auth, route token, bearer, and secret-boundary evidence after NA-0555 diagnostics indicated the remaining relay-push failure may be owned by external configuration or secret state. Define exact non-secret operator proof requirements, redaction rules, classification rules, and successor selection. This lane is authorization-only and must not request or publish secret values. Allowed scope: `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0556_remote_relay_environment_secret_boundary_review_authorization_plan.md`; `tests/NA-0556_remote_relay_environment_secret_boundary_review_authorization_testplan.md`; `DECISIONS.md`; `TRACEABILITY.md`; `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md`; read-only NA-0555 proof-root evidence and redacted summaries; read-only workflow variable names, not values; exact future operator non-secret proof requirements; exact private-material policy; successor selection. Forbidden scope: requesting or publishing secret values; endpoint/route-token/capability publication; script remediation; qsc source/test/fuzz/Cargo mutation; workflow mutation; dependency/lockfile mutation; local reproduction; qsc send/receive or E2EE; rerun or workflow dispatch; qsl-server/qsl-attachments; remote command; qwork/qstart/qresume execution by Codex; qsl-backup execution; backup mutation; public-site/Cloudflare mutation; private material publication; public-readiness, production-readiness, vulnerability-free, bug-free, or perfect-build claim.
  - **Boundary proof:** No rerun executed. No workflow mutation occurred. No source, script, qsc source/test/fuzz/Cargo, dependency, or lockfile mutation occurred. No local reproduction occurred. No qsc send/receive or E2EE occurred. No qsl-server or qsl-attachments command, clone, build, run, or mutation occurred. No public-site mutation occurred. No Cloudflare mutation occurred. No qwork, qstart, or qresume execution by Codex occurred. No qsl-backup execution occurred. No backup mutation occurred. No private material was published. No raw logs or artifacts were copied into repository docs. Exactly one READY remains mandatory until closeout.
  - **Claim boundary:** No public-readiness claim was made. No production-readiness claim was made. No public-internet-readiness claim was made. No external-review-complete claim was made. No reproducibility-complete claim was made. No backup/restore-complete claim was made. No vulnerability-free claim was made. No bug-free claim was made. No perfect-build or perfect-crypto claim was made.
  - **Recovered failures:** The first current-main required-check classifier treated `CodeQL` and `goal-lint` as missing on the merge commit. Classification: recoverable classifier-visibility issue. Corrective action: captured associated PR metadata and associated PR-head check-runs/statuses for those PR-only contexts and reran the classifier once. Final result: current-main required-check classification passed. A proof-root extraction pass initially selected truncated normalized relay diagnostic lines before full marker lines; it was corrected before any repository summary was written by using the consolidated marker files as the authoritative diagnostic extract. Final result: both target classifications passed.
  - **Security invariants introduced/changed:**
    - NA-0555 changes no protocol, wire, crypto, auth, state-machine, qsc runtime, script, workflow, dependency, service, public-site, or Cloudflare semantics.
    - Raw logs and artifacts remain proof-root-only.
    - Repository evidence may include only bounded redacted diagnostic fields and run/job identifiers.
    - The next lane must be authorization-only and must not request or publish secret values.
  - **Alternatives considered:**
    - Script remediation (rejected because diagnostics did not prove a script-owned issue).
    - qsc runtime remediation or review (rejected because qsc emitted the intended redacted diagnostics and the observed error is timeout with no status/body).
    - remote relay API-shape review (rejected because no HTTP status or endpoint-not-found evidence was observed).
    - confirmation rerun (rejected because both authorized targets produced consistent diagnostic classifications).
    - stop (rejected because diagnostics were observed, classified, and safely redacted).
  - **Implications for spec/impl/tests:**
    - `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0555_remote_relay_api_boundary_diagnostic_evidence_capture_harness.md` records qwork proof, D-1098/D-1099 inheritance, current-main checks, dispatch gate, run/job/artifact metadata, log capture, redaction/private-material review, target diagnostic evidence, target classifications, result classification, selected successor, and no-mutation/no-claim boundaries.
    - `tests/NA-0555_remote_relay_api_boundary_diagnostic_evidence_capture_testplan.md` records the required NA-0555 evidence-capture markers.
    - `TRACEABILITY.md` maps NA-0555 to D-1100, the two authorized run IDs/jobs, target classifications, overall classification, selected successor, and proof-root-only raw-log/artifact boundaries.
    - `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md` records directive proof, recovered classifier visibility, workflow dispatches, classification, selected successor, and validation/CI notes.
  - **References:** NA-0555; NA-0556; D-1100; D-1099; D-1098; runs `28325075419`, `28325168201`; jobs `83913585385`, `83913828473`; `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0555_remote_relay_api_boundary_diagnostic_evidence_capture_harness.md`; `tests/NA-0555_remote_relay_api_boundary_diagnostic_evidence_capture_testplan.md`; `TRACEABILITY.md`; `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md`

  - **Operator proof review:** The operator proof package was reviewed proof-root-only. Expected files were present. Operator-supplied scan pass was true and Codex private-material scan agreed. No secret values were accessed or published. No route-token/capability values were accessed or published. No bearer values or Authorization headers were accessed or published. No private endpoint host or private topology was published. Unknown and not_checked fields were preserved as unknowns.
  - **Boundary classifications:** Endpoint configuration `ENDPOINT_CONFIGURED_UNKNOWN`; endpoint host publication `ENDPOINT_PRIVATE_NOT_REPORTED`; DNS `DNS_RESOLUTION_NOT_CHECKED`; TCP `TCP_CONNECT_NOT_CHECKED`; TLS `TLS_HANDSHAKE_NOT_CHECKED`; service health `RELAY_SERVICE_HEALTH_NOT_CHECKED`; auth/route configuration `AUTH_ROUTE_CONFIGURED_UNKNOWN`; runner-specific proof `GITHUB_RUNNER_PROOF_NOT_PERFORMED`; overall environment boundary `REMOTE_RELAY_OPERATOR_PROOF_INSUFFICIENT_TARGETED_PROBE_REQUIRED`.

The lane must not request, reveal, or publish route tokens, bearer values, Authorization headers, private endpoints, private topology, payloads, response bodies, or secret environment values.     - NA-0557 changes no protocol, wire, crypto, auth, state-machine, qsc runtime, script, workflow, dependency, service, public-site, or Cloudflare semantics.

Future private-material policy was selected. The selected future proof files are `00_probe_manifest.kv`, `01_endpoint_config_presence.json`, `02_dns_tcp_tls_probe.json`, `03_service_health_probe.json`, `04_secret_presence_metadata.json`, `05_probe_private_material_scan.json`, and `06_safe_to_paste_summary.json`. The future lane must reject unsafe disclosure flags before publication.

  - **Exact successor selected:** `NA-0559 -- QSL Remote Relay Targeted Non-Secret Operator Probe Capture Harness`.

The operator must run commands locally or on the appropriate operator-selected host, review all outputs before sharing, and preserve only redacted proof files. Codex must review proof read-only, verify no secret values or private endpoint/topology details are published, classify endpoint/DNS/TCP/TLS/service-health/auth/route/runner boundaries, and select a later exact environment fix, service-owner proof, GitHub-runner confirmation, qsc runtime review, or stop successor. No qsc send/receive or E2EE executed. No source, script, qsc source/test/fuzz/Cargo, workflow, dependency, lockfile, qsl-server, qsl-attachments, public-site, or Cloudflare mutation occurred. No qsl-server or qsl-attachments command, clone, build, run, local use, or mutation occurred. No qwork, qstart, or qresume execution by Codex occurred. No qsl-backup execution occurred. No backup mutation occurred. No raw logs or artifacts were copied into repository docs. No private material was published. Exactly one READY remains mandatory.
  - **Private-material boundary:** No secret values were requested or published. No route-token/capability values were requested or published. No bearer values or Authorization headers were requested or published. No private endpoints or private topology were published. No raw payloads or response bodies were published. The future private-material policy requires stopping on URL/scheme, probable IP address, Authorization header, bearer-token-looking, route-token/capability-looking, private-key, SSH-material, Cloudflare-token-looking, API-key-looking, long opaque token, payload-hint, or response-body-hint findings except public commit SHAs, GitHub run/job IDs, non-secret labels, safe enum values, and explicit `no`, `unknown`, or `not_checked` strings.

No backup/restore-complete claim was made. No vulnerability-free claim was made. No bug-free claim was made. No perfect-build or perfect-crypto claim was made.

    - NA-0558 changes no protocol, wire, crypto, auth, state-machine, qsc runtime, script, workflow, dependency, service, public-site, or Cloudflare semantics.
    - Repository evidence may include only bounded non-secret classification summaries.
    - Future operator proof must be one-step-at-a-time, operator-reviewed before sharing, and rejected if any private material or unsafe disclosure flag is present.
    - Local/operator-host success and operator-selected remote-host success do not prove GitHub-hosted runner success unless the proof origin is the actual runner context.
    - GitHub Actions runner proof requires a later exact workflow/dispatch lane.
  - **Alternatives considered:**
    - Remote service owner proof authorization (not selected because targeted operator non-secret probe capture is the narrower next step).
    - GitHub Actions runner-specific proof authorization (not selected because it requires a separate exact workflow lane if needed).
    - qsc runtime review (not selected because environment proof is not clean enough to shift suspicion to qsc).
    - Stop/ambiguous (not selected because safe proof commands and schema are definable).

    - `TRACEABILITY.md` maps NA-0558 to D-1106, the selected NA-0559 successor, future proof schema, private-material policy, and no-mutation/private-material boundaries.
    - `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md` records NA-0558 proof gates, parser recovery, classification, selected successor, and validation/CI notes.

- **ID:** D-1108
  - **Title:** NA-0559 Codex-executed non-secret relay probe authorization pivot
  - **Date:** 2026-06-28
  - **Status:** Accepted
  - **Goal IDs:** G1, G2, G3, G4, G5
  - **Decision:** NA-0559 Codex-executed non-secret relay probe authorization pivot is accepted. D-1106 and D-1107 were consumed. Fresh qwork proof from `2026-06-28T19:38:46Z` was verified from copied proof files. Current main HEAD and origin/main were verified at `2ae25ad37c6e`. public-safety completed success. advisories completed success. No failed required check was classified. Branch-protection required contexts were classified, with associated PR-head proof used for PR-scoped `goal-lint` and `CodeQL` contexts. The operator request for Codex-executed probes was consumed. The previous operator-run probe model is superseded for the next lane only.
  - **Operator context recorded without probing:** The operator identified `inspiron` as the remote test/relay/server host label on Tailscale, identified `qslcodex` as the user label, stated `ssh inspiron` as the access form, and noted shell command execution may not currently be configured. NA-0559 does not authorize shell/account repair, SSH, Tailscale use, remote command execution, or probe execution.
  - **Prior evidence consumed:** NA-0555 remote-handshake and remote-relay timeout diagnostics were consumed as redacted non-secret facts: endpoint label `relay_push_v1`, qsc error `relay_inbox_push_failed`, route-token header present true, bearer auth present true, and HTTP status/body unknown. NA-0557 operator proof insufficiency was consumed: endpoint configuration, DNS, TCP, TLS, service health, auth/route, and GitHub runner proof remained unknown, insufficient, or not checked. NA-0558 operator-run proof design was consumed, then superseded for the next lane by the operator request for Codex execution.
  - **NA-0560 exact command authority selected:** NA-0560 may run Codex-executed non-secret probes only from `LOCAL_QBUILD_HOST`, `INSPIRON_VIA_SSH_IF_NO_REMOTE_MUTATION_REQUIRED`, and `GITHUB_METADATA_READ_ONLY`. It may attempt exactly one non-mutating SSH command-execution check: `ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 inspiron 'printf QSL_REMOTE_PROBE_READY\n'`. If unavailable because shell command execution is not configured, NA-0560 must stop with `REMOTE_PROBE_ACCESS_UNAVAILABLE_OPERATOR_ACTION_REQUIRED`. NA-0560 must not fix shell access, modify `qslcodex`, run sudo, mutate `inspiron`, mutate Tailscale/network/service state, dispatch workflows, rerun jobs, perform qsc send/receive, perform qsc E2EE, push POST payloads, or read secret files for publication.
  - **NA-0560 private-material policy selected:** NA-0560 must scan all output before repository docs or final response use. It must not publish endpoint values, URLs, private hosts, private IPs, private topology, route-token/capability values, bearer values, Authorization headers, payloads, response bodies, secret environment values, private keys, SSH private material, Cloudflare tokens, or API keys. Allowed outputs are coarse classes only: probe origin, endpoint configured yes/no/unknown, endpoint value disclosed no, DNS/TCP/TLS/service-health class, secret and route presence yes/no/unknown, body disclosed no, raw-output private-material yes/no, redaction review pass/fail, no-secret assertion, and SSH reachability class. It must stop if private material appears or if account mutation would be needed.
  - **Result classification:** `REMOTE_RELAY_CODEX_EXECUTED_NON_SECRET_PROBE_AUTH_READY`.
  - **Exact successor selected:** `NA-0560 -- QSL Remote Relay Codex-Executed Non-Secret Probe Harness`.
  - **Selected successor block:** NA-0560 is READY with Goals G1, G2, G3, G4, G5. Objective: execute the D-1108-authorized Codex-run non-secret remote relay probe plan to classify the `relay_inbox_push_failed` network/TLS/timeout boundary. Codex may perform only exact non-mutating probes authorized by D-1108: current-main proof, read-only GitHub metadata, local redacted probe classification where safe, and one bounded SSH command-execution check to `inspiron`. If SSH command execution is available without remote mutation, Codex may run the exact redacted probe script authorized by D-1108 to produce coarse DNS/TCP/TLS/service-health and secret-presence classes. Codex must not fix shell access, mutate `inspiron`, publish endpoint values, publish token/bearer values, publish Authorization headers, publish private topology, send qsc payloads, dispatch workflows, rerun jobs, or mutate source/scripts/workflows/dependencies. Allowed scope: `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0560_remote_relay_codex_executed_non_secret_probe_harness.md`; `tests/NA-0560_remote_relay_codex_executed_non_secret_probe_testplan.md`; `DECISIONS.md`; `TRACEABILITY.md`; `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md`; proof-root-only redacted probe outputs; read-only NA-0555/NA-0556/NA-0557/NA-0558/NA-0559 evidence; read-only GitHub metadata; exact SSH reachability command `ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 inspiron 'printf QSL_REMOTE_PROBE_READY\n'`; exact redacted probe script execution only if SSH command execution is available and the script is proof-root generated and non-mutating; private-material scan/redaction proof; successor selection. Forbidden scope: qwork/qstart/qresume execution by Codex; fixing or changing qslcodex shell/login/account state; sudo/admin action; Tailscale mutation; remote file mutation; service mutation; firewall/network configuration mutation; qsc send/receive; qsc E2EE; payload push; workflow dispatch; rerun; source/script/qsc mutation; workflow mutation; dependency/lockfile mutation; qsl-server/qsl-attachments; qsl-backup; backup mutation; public-site mutation; Cloudflare mutation; endpoint value publication; route-token/capability value publication; bearer value publication; Authorization header publication; private endpoint or private topology publication; payload or response body publication; secret environment value publication; public-readiness, production-readiness, vulnerability-free, bug-free, or perfect-build claim.
  - **Boundary proof:** No probes were executed. No SSH, Tailscale, or remote command was executed by Codex. No workflow dispatch executed. No rerun executed. No local reproduction executed. No qsc send/receive or E2EE executed. No source, script, qsc source/test/fuzz/Cargo, workflow, dependency, lockfile, qsl-server, qsl-attachments, public-site, or Cloudflare mutation occurred. No qsl-server or qsl-attachments command, clone, build, run, local use, or mutation occurred. No qwork, qstart, or qresume execution by Codex occurred. No qsl-backup execution occurred. No backup mutation occurred. No raw logs or artifacts were copied into repository docs. No private material was published. Exactly one READY remains mandatory.
  - **Private-material boundary:** No secret values were requested or published. No route-token/capability values were requested or published. No bearer values or Authorization headers were requested or published. No private endpoints or private topology were published. No raw payloads or response bodies were published. No private material was published.
  - **Claim boundary:** No public-readiness claim was made. No production-readiness claim was made. No public-internet-readiness claim was made. No external-review-complete claim was made. No backup/restore-complete claim was made. No vulnerability-free claim was made. No bug-free claim was made. No perfect-build or perfect-crypto claim was made.
  - **Recovered failures:** The first proof-root Phase 1-7 writer found D-1106 and D-1107 once but failed to classify their indented `Status: Accepted` fields. Classification: recoverable command-shape/parser issue before repository mutation. Corrective action: reran once with indentation-tolerant status parsing. Final result: proof artifacts passed. The first new-file discovery after creating the allowed NA-0559 evidence and testplan did not show the files in normal untracked output because existing ignore rules match evidence directories and secret-looking filenames. Classification: valid zero-match discovery/proof outcome. Corrective action: force-added exactly the two directive-authorized new markdown files and normalized their file mode. Final result: new files were tracked for the implementation diff. The first implementation overclaim scan flagged explicit negative claim-boundary wording as positive claim text. Classification: recoverable scan-context issue. Corrective action: reran once with claim-boundary negative context recognized. Final result: validation passed.
  - **Security invariants introduced/changed:**
    - NA-0559 changes no protocol, wire, crypto, auth, state-machine, qsc runtime, script, workflow, dependency, service, public-site, or Cloudflare semantics.
    - The operator-run model is superseded only for the next lane and only by D-1108's exact Codex-executed non-secret authority.
    - NA-0560 may attempt only the exact bounded SSH reachability command before any remote script and must stop rather than fix access if command execution is unavailable.
    - Repository evidence may include only bounded non-secret classification summaries.
    - Any private-material output requires quarantine and stop before publication.
    - Exactly one READY remains mandatory.
  - **Alternatives considered:**
    - Keep NA-0559 as operator-run proof capture (not selected because the operator explicitly requested Codex-executed probing).
    - Authorize shell/account fixing in NA-0559 or NA-0560 (rejected because that would mutate remote/account state).
    - Authorize workflow dispatch or rerun now (rejected because local/remote non-secret classification can be bounded first without CI mutation).
    - Stop/ambiguous (not selected because exact authority, allowlist, stop rules, and successor are definable).
  - **Implications for spec/impl/tests:**
    - `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0559_remote_relay_targeted_non_secret_operator_probe_capture_harness.md` records qwork proof, D-1106/D-1107 inheritance, operator request, current-main required-check classification, prior evidence gap review, Codex-executed authority design, exact NA-0560 command allowlist, private-material policy, option review, result classification, selected successor, and no-mutation/no-claim boundaries.
    - `tests/NA-0559_remote_relay_targeted_non_secret_operator_probe_capture_testplan.md` records the required NA-0559 authorization markers.
    - `TRACEABILITY.md` maps NA-0559 to D-1108, the selected NA-0560 successor, exact command allowlist, private-material policy, and no-mutation/private-material boundaries.
    - `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md` records NA-0559 proof gates, parser recovery, classification, selected successor, and validation/CI notes.
  - **References:** NA-0559; NA-0560; D-1108; D-1107; D-1106; D478 response; D477 response; D474 response; `docs/governance/evidence/NA-0559_remote_relay_targeted_non_secret_operator_probe_capture_harness.md`; `tests/NA-0559_remote_relay_targeted_non_secret_operator_probe_capture_testplan.md`; `TRACEABILITY.md`; `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md`

Fresh qwork proof from `2026-06-28T20:41:09Z` was verified from copied proof files before probe execution or repository mutation. Current main HEAD and origin/main were verified at `e74f9c211690`. public-safety completed success. advisories completed success. No failed required check was classified. Branch-protection required contexts were classified green on the merge commit or conclusively satisfied by PR #1392 head checks merged into `e74f9c211690`.
  - **Operator context consumed:** The operator-supplied `inspiron` and `qslcodex` SSH tunnel context was consumed without publishing raw authorized_keys content, public key material, private key material, endpoint values, private topology, route-token/capability values, bearer values, Authorization headers, payloads, or response bodies.
  - **Probe execution proof:** Proof-root-only probe scripts were generated and statically reviewed. The local qbuild host probe executed and classified `LOCAL_PROBE_ENDPOINT_ABSENT_OR_UNKNOWN`. The SSH command-execution reachability command executed and classified `SSH_COMMAND_EXECUTION_SUCCESS`. The SSH port-forward setup command executed and classified `SSH_PORT_FORWARD_SETUP_SUCCESS`. The forwarded relay probe executed because port-forward setup succeeded and classified `SSH_PORT_FORWARD_RELAY_TCP_REFUSED`. Tunnel cleanup classified `SSH_TUNNEL_CLEANUP_SUCCESS`. The remote stdin probe executed because command execution succeeded and classified `REMOTE_PROBE_SECRET_PRESENCE_CLASSIFIED`.
  - **Private-material proof:** Probe raw outputs remain proof-root-only. Private-material scans passed. Endpoint values were not published. Route-token/capability values were not published. Bearer values or Authorization headers were not published. Private topology was not published. Payloads or response bodies were not published. Authorized_keys content and public key material were not published. No private material was published.
  - **Result classification:** `CODEX_PROBE_SSH_TUNNEL_RELAY_UNREACHABLE_SERVICE_OWNER_PROOF_REQUIRED`.
  - **Exact successor selected:** `NA-0561 -- QSL Remote Relay Service Owner Non-Secret Proof Authorization Plan`.
  - **Selected successor block:** NA-0561 is READY with Goals G1, G2, G3, G4, G5. Objective: Authorize collection of non-secret proof from the remote relay service owner or deployer after NA-0560 showed the SSH tunnel path exists but the forwarded relay service did not respond as expected. Define exact non-secret service availability, deployment, DNS/TLS, loopback listener, path/method, and health proof fields. Do not request or publish private topology, private endpoints, tokens, bearer material, Authorization headers, payloads, response bodies, or secret values. No qsl-server or qsl-attachments command, clone, build, run, local use, or mutation occurred. No qsl-backup execution occurred. No backup mutation occurred. No public-readiness claim was made. No production-readiness claim was made. No vulnerability-free claim was made. No bug-free claim was made. No perfect-build or perfect-crypto claim was made. Exactly one READY remains mandatory.

Classification: recoverable command-shape/parser issue before repository mutation. Corrective action: reran once with the actual decision ID format. Final result: queue/decision proof passed. The first current-main required-check classifier used check-runs only and missed required contexts satisfied on the merged PR head. Classification: recoverable classifier issue before repository mutation. Corrective action: reran with current merge-commit checks plus PR #1392 head checks as conclusive branch-protection proof. Final result: required checks classified green or conclusively satisfied. The first SSH command reachability classifier expected a newline-exact ready marker. Classification: recoverable classifier issue with no SSH rerun. Corrective action: reclassified existing captured output because the exact authorized command exited 0 and emitted the ready marker with literal `n` behavior. Final result: SSH command execution classified success.
  - **Security invariants introduced/changed:**
    - NA-0560 changes no protocol, wire, crypto, auth, state-machine, qsc runtime, script, workflow, dependency, service, public-site, or Cloudflare semantics.

  - **Alternatives considered:**

    - GitHub runner tunnel proof (not selected because the forwarded relay TCP probe was refused in the operator-reported tunnel context).

    - Endpoint configuration proof (not selected because the tunnel refusal is a more discriminating service-owner boundary).

- **ID:** D-1112
  - **Title:** NA-0561 remote relay service owner non-secret proof authorization
  - **Date:** 2026-06-28
  - **Status:** Accepted
  - **Goal IDs:** G1, G2, G3, G4, G5
  - **Decision:** NA-0561 service-owner non-secret proof authorization is accepted. D-1110 and D-1111 were consumed. Fresh qwork proof from `2026-06-28T22:13:16Z` was verified from copied proof files before repository mutation. Current main HEAD and origin/main were verified at `402616e9e2bc`. public-safety completed success. advisories completed success. No failed required check was classified. Branch-protection required contexts were classified green on the merge commit or conclusively satisfied by PR #1394 head checks merged into `402616e9e2bc`.
  - **Inherited NA-0560 result:** NA-0560 root-cause classification `CODEX_PROBE_SSH_TUNNEL_RELAY_UNREACHABLE_SERVICE_OWNER_PROOF_REQUIRED` was consumed. SSH command execution success was consumed. SSH port-forward setup success was consumed. Forwarded relay TCP refused was consumed. Forwarded HEAD was not checked because TCP was refused. Remote command-execution environment endpoint/auth/route candidates were absent in that command-execution context. Private-material scans passed.
  - **Boundary selected:** The service-owner/listener boundary is selected. SSH access and tunnel setup are OK. Loopback listener absence or port mismatch is likely. Service deployment down/not-listening, port mismatch, or health unknown is the next proof target. qsc runtime is not the primary suspect until service listener proof is clean. GitHub runner proof is deferred because the tunnel-local service itself refused TCP.
  - **Exact NA-0562 command allowlist selected:** NA-0562 may run exactly one bounded SSH command-execution reachability check: `ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 inspiron 'printf INSPIRON_SERVICE_OWNER_NON_SECRET_READY\n'`. NA-0562 may run exactly one proof-root-generated remote listener probe through SSH standard input: `ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 inspiron 'python3 - --origin INSPIRON_SERVICE_OWNER_NON_SECRET' < "$PROOF_DIR/probe_scripts/remote_listener_probe.py"`. No SSH command outside this allowlist is authorized.
  - **Exact NA-0562 proof schema selected:** NA-0562 must output only coarse JSON fields: `proof_origin`, `listener_probe_method`, `listener_present_class`, `listener_bind_class`, `tcp_connect_class`, `v1_push_head_class`, disclosure flags for response body, process identity, endpoint values, token values, bearer values, Authorization headers, private topology, mutation flags for service/account/shell, `codex_asserts_no_private_material_published`, `raw_output_contains_private_material`, and `redaction_review`.
  - **Exact NA-0562 private-material policy selected:** NA-0562 must stop before repository publication if output contains endpoint values, private hosts/IPs, private topology, route-token/capability values, bearer values, Authorization headers, payloads, response bodies, raw authorized_keys/public key material, private keys, secret environment values, Cloudflare tokens, or API tokens. Repository docs may contain only coarse classes and scan outcomes.
  - **Exact NA-0562 decision tree selected:** NA-0562 must select exactly one of `SERVICE_OWNER_LISTENER_ABSENT_REMEDIATION_READY`, `SERVICE_OWNER_PORT_MISMATCH_REMEDIATION_READY`, `SERVICE_OWNER_LISTENER_PRESENT_BUT_PATH_UNHEALTHY_READY`, `SERVICE_OWNER_LISTENER_PRESENT_GITHUB_RUNNER_PROOF_READY`, `SERVICE_OWNER_PROOF_ACCESS_UNAVAILABLE_OPERATOR_ACTION_REQUIRED`, `SERVICE_OWNER_PROOF_PRIVATE_MATERIAL_STOP`, or `SERVICE_OWNER_PROOF_AMBIGUOUS_STOP`.
  - **Result classification:** `REMOTE_RELAY_SERVICE_OWNER_LISTENER_PROOF_CAPTURE_READY`.
  - **Exact successor selected:** `NA-0562 -- QSL Remote Relay Service Listener Non-Secret Proof Capture Harness`.
  - **Selected successor block:** NA-0562 is READY with Goals G1, G2, G3, G4, G5. Objective: Execute the D-1112-authorized service-owner non-secret proof capture to determine whether the remote relay service is listening on the expected loopback target behind the SSH tunnel. Codex may run only exact non-mutating commands authorized by D-1112: current-main proof, read-only GitHub metadata where needed, one bounded SSH command-execution check to `inspiron`, and one proof-root-generated remote listener probe script through SSH stdin. The lane must classify listener presence, TCP connect class, and HEAD class without publishing endpoint values, private hosts/IPs, private topology, tokens, bearer values, Authorization headers, payloads, response bodies, process identity, or secret environment values. Codex must not mutate accounts, shells, authorized_keys, Tailscale, services, qsl-server, qsl-attachments, source, scripts, workflows, dependencies, or backup state. Final result: queue/decision proof and required-check classification passed. Classification: valid zero-match discovery/proof outcome. Corrective action: force-added exactly the two directive-authorized new markdown files and normalized their file mode. Final result: new files were tracked for the implementation diff. The first post-commit synthetic goal-lint event writer did not export the base/head SHA variables before invoking the event writer, so goal-lint lacked `GITHUB_EVENT_PATH`. Classification: recoverable command-shape issue. Corrective action: reran once with exported `BASE_SHA`, `HEAD_SHA`, and event path. Final result: goal-lint passed.

Post-merge public-safety completed success. Post-merge advisories completed success. No failed required check was classified. This closeout marks NA-0561 DONE and restores NA-0562 as the exactly one READY successor.
  - **Selected successor model:** NA-0562 is a service-owner listener non-secret proof-capture lane. It may run only exact D-1112-authorized non-mutating commands, one bounded SSH command-execution check to `inspiron`, and one proof-root-generated remote listener probe through SSH stdin. It must publish only coarse listener, bind, TCP, HEAD class, disclosure, mutation, private-material, and redaction fields.
  - **Selected successor block:** NA-0562 is READY with Goals G1, G2, G3, G4, G5. Objective: Execute the D-1112-authorized service-owner non-secret proof capture to determine whether the remote relay service is listening on the expected loopback target behind the SSH tunnel. Codex may run only exact non-mutating commands authorized by D-1112: current-main proof, read-only GitHub metadata where needed, one bounded SSH command-execution check to `inspiron`, and one proof-root-generated remote listener probe script through SSH stdin. The lane must classify listener presence, TCP connect class, and HEAD /v1/push class without publishing endpoint values, private hosts/IPs, private topology, tokens, bearer values, Authorization headers, payloads, response bodies, process identity, or secret environment values. Codex must not mutate accounts, shells, authorized_keys, Tailscale, services, qsl-server, qsl-attachments, source, scripts, workflows, dependencies, or backup state. - **ID:** D-1114

  - **Date:** 2026-06-28
  - **Status:** Accepted
  - **Goal IDs:** G1, G2, G3, G4, G5
  - **Decision:** NA-0562 service listener non-secret proof capture is accepted. D-1112 and D-1113 were consumed. D482 marker mismatch stop was consumed and recovered by using the D-1112 exact readiness marker. Fresh qwork proof from `2026-06-28T23:03:37Z` was verified from copied proof files before SSH execution or repository mutation. Current main HEAD and origin/main were verified at `6972309858fa`. public-safety completed success. advisories completed success. No failed required check was classified. Branch-protection required contexts were classified green or conclusively satisfied.
  - **Probe evidence:** The proof-root-only remote listener probe script was generated and statically reviewed. The SSH listener readiness command was executed exactly once and classified `SSH_LISTENER_PROBE_READY`. The remote listener probe was executed exactly once after readiness succeeded. Remote listener proof raw output remains proof-root-only. Private-material scans passed.
  - **Listener proof classes:** listener presence class `no`; listener bind class `not_available`; other loopback listener presence class `yes`; TCP connect class `refused`; v1_push HEAD class `not_checked`; remote listener probe classification `REMOTE_LISTENER_OTHER_LOOPBACK_PRESENT_EXPECTED_ABSENT`.
  - **Result classification:** `SERVICE_OWNER_PORT_MISMATCH_REMEDIATION_READY`.
  - **Exact successor selected:** `NA-0563 -- QSL Remote Relay Loopback Port Alignment Authorization Plan`.
  - **Selected successor block:** NA-0563 is READY with Goals G1, G2, G3, G4, G5. Objective: Authorize a bounded non-secret remediation plan for a likely mismatch between the SSH tunnel's expected loopback target and the remote relay service listener. Define exact operator/service-owner proof and action requirements to align the tunnel target, service listener, or workflow access model without publishing private ports beyond already authorized labels, endpoint values, topology, tokens, bearer values, Authorization headers, payloads, response bodies, process identity, or secret environment values. This lane is authorization-only. Forbidden scope: Codex service/tunnel/account mutation; endpoint/topology/token/body publication; source/script/workflow/dependency mutation; workflow dispatch/rerun; qsl-server/qsl-attachments mutation; public-site/Cloudflare mutation.

No private material was published.

No qsc send/receive or E2EE occurred. No workflow dispatch or rerun occurred. No source, script, workflow, dependency, or lockfile mutation occurred. No qsl-server or qsl-attachments command or mutation occurred. No qsl-backup execution occurred. No backup mutation occurred. No public-site mutation occurred. No Cloudflare mutation occurred.

No vulnerability-free claim was made. No bug-free claim was made. No perfect-build or perfect-crypto claim was made.

D483 recovered by using the D-1112 exact marker. The first D483 D482-recovery proof parser used overly narrow wording; classification: recoverable local proof-validation/parser issue. Corrective action: reran with D482 proof-root JSON and actual stop wording. Final result: pass.

Branch-protection required contexts were classified green or conclusively satisfied.

The SSH alignment readiness command was executed exactly once and classified `SSH_ALIGNMENT_PROBE_READY`. The remote alignment probe was executed exactly once after readiness succeeded. Remote alignment proof raw output remains proof-root-only. Private-material scans passed.
  - **Alignment proof classes:** expected target listener presence `unknown`; other loopback listener presence `yes`; loopback listener count class `one`; candidate listener class `present`; expected target alignment class `unknown`; action owner `unknown`; operator action required `unknown`.

  - **Result classification:** `LOOPBACK_ALIGNMENT_CANDIDATE_PROOF_READY`.
  - **Exact successor selected:** `NA-0565 -- QSL Remote Relay Loopback Candidate Confirmation Proof Harness`.
  - **Selected successor block:** NA-0565 is READY with Goals G1, G2, G3, G4, G5. Objective: Run or review exact non-secret proof to confirm the safe loopback listener candidate class identified by NA-0564 before authorizing an operator action bundle. Codex must not publish private port values, process identity, endpoint values, private topology, token values, bearer values, Authorization headers, payloads, response bodies, or secret material. Bearer values or Authorization headers were not published. Private topology was not published. Process identity was not published. Payloads or response bodies were not published. Authorized_keys/public key material was not published. No private material was published.

No qsc send/receive or E2EE occurred. No workflow dispatch or rerun occurred. No source, script, workflow, dependency, or lockfile mutation occurred. No qsl-server or qsl-attachments command or mutation occurred. No qsl-backup execution occurred. No backup mutation occurred. No public-site mutation occurred. No Cloudflare mutation occurred.

No vulnerability-free claim was made. No bug-free claim was made. No perfect-build or perfect-crypto claim was made.

Corrective action: classified `goal-lint` through PR #1400 rollup and `CodeQL` through successful attached analysis/code-scanning metadata. Final result: current-main required-check classification passed. The initial probe-script static scanner treated the directive-required authorized-key disclosure flag as forbidden material. Classification: recoverable static-scanner false positive. Corrective action: allowed the required disclosure flag while preserving path/content bans. Final result: script review passed. The initial SSH readiness classifier expected only a newline-terminated marker. Classification: recoverable local proof-classifier issue; SSH was not rerun. Corrective action: classified the exact-command marker variant from raw captured bytes. Final result: readiness passed.

    - NA-0564 changes no protocol, wire, crypto, auth, state-machine, qsc runtime, source, repository script, workflow, dependency, service, public-site, or Cloudflare semantics.

    - Exactly one READY remains mandatory until closeout.
  - **Alternatives considered:**
    - Operator action bundle ready (rejected because expected-target alignment stayed unknown).
    - Service-owner proof required (rejected because a coarse candidate listener class was present and can be confirmed by a narrower proof lane).
    - Already-correct GitHub runner proof (rejected because alignment was not confirmed aligned).
    - Access action (rejected because SSH readiness succeeded).
    - Stop ambiguous/private-material (rejected because the proof was private-material clean and selected an exact candidate confirmation successor).

Post-merge proof verified D-1120 once, D-1121 absent before this patch, READY_COUNT 1 with READY NA-0565, duplicate decision count zero, clean worktree, public-safety success, advisories success, suite2-vectors success, no failed required check, and root disk below the stop threshold. The closeout patch is limited to `NEXT_ACTIONS.md`, `DECISIONS.md`, `TRACEABILITY.md`, `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md`, and `tests/NA-0565_closeout_restore_na0566_testplan.md`.
  - **Boundary proof:** No NA-0566 implementation occurred. No operator action executed in closeout. No secret values were published. No endpoint, topology, token, bearer, Authorization header, response body, payload, or process identity was published. No raw authorized_keys or public key material was published. No workflow dispatch executed. No rerun executed. No source, script, workflow, dependency, lockfile, qsl-server, qsl-attachments, public-site, or Cloudflare mutation occurred. No account or service mutation occurred. No private material was published.
  - **Claim boundary:** No public-readiness claim was made. No production-readiness claim was made. No public-internet-readiness claim was made. No external-review-complete claim was made. No vulnerability-free claim was made. No bug-free claim was made. No perfect-build claim was made. No perfect-crypto claim was made.
  - **Security invariants introduced/changed:**
    - Closeout changes no protocol, wire, crypto, auth, state-machine, qsc runtime, source, repository script, workflow, dependency, service, public-site, or Cloudflare semantics.
    - NA-0566 is restored only as the D-1120-selected listener deployment proof authorization lane.
    - NA-0566 must not implement remote/service/account/tunnel mutation.
    - Exactly one READY remains mandatory.
  - **Alternatives considered:**
    - Leave NA-0565 READY after implementation merge (rejected because D-1120 was accepted and selected an exact successor).
    - Implement NA-0566 during closeout (rejected as out of scope).
    - Restore an operator action proof lane (rejected because D-1120 selected deployment proof authorization after no candidate was confirmed).
  - **Implications for spec/impl/tests:**
    - `NEXT_ACTIONS.md` marks NA-0565 DONE and restores NA-0566 READY using the exact D-1120-selected successor block.
    - `tests/NA-0565_closeout_restore_na0566_testplan.md` records closeout markers, implementation PR merge proof, D-1120 acceptance, post-merge check proof, selected successor exactness, no NA-0566 implementation, no operator action execution, no workflow/dependency/service/public mutation, no private-material publication, no public/production overclaim, and the one-READY invariant.
    - `TRACEABILITY.md` maps NA-0565 closeout and NA-0566 restoration to D-1121.
    - `docs/ops/ROLLING_OPERATIONS_JOURNAL.md` records the NA-0565 closeout state, D-1121, and restored NA-0566 successor.
